Package jline.lang

Class NetworkStruct

  • java.lang.Object
    • jline.lang.NetworkStruct
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Cloneable
    public class NetworkStruct
extends Object
implements Serializable, Cloneable
    Class summarizing the characteristics of a Network object
    See Also:
